overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character running along a palm-lined coastal street at sunset. The Del Perro Pier ferris wheel is visible in the distance as the character moves through a residential beachside neighborhood.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal residential street with palm tree median

agents.ego_description: running along the asphalt street away from the camera toward the distant ferris wheel, positioned on the right side of the road

entered.detail: continuous line of tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
large illuminated ferris wheel visible in the distance against the sunset sky
single-story residential building with white facade and red trim on the right side
grassy median strip between the sidewalk and the palm trees

segments.scene_description: Following a character running along a palm-lined coastal street during golden hour. The Del Perro Pier ferris wheel stands visible in the distance ahead, while a beachside building sits on the right. The character runs steadily forward on the asphalt road.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal residential street with palm tree median

events.description: controlled character exits frame left, camera continues moving forward without the character in view

agents.ego_description: camera continues moving forward along the street after the character has run out of frame, maintaining the same pace

segments.scene_description: The camera continues moving forward along the palm-lined street after the character has exited the frame. The beachside building on the right falls behind as the view opens up toward the distant ferris wheel and mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a coastal street that transitions from a character-led run into an open, scenic vista of the horizon. It begins by trailing a character running steadily along an asphalt road lined with palm trees during the golden hour, with a beachside building to the right and the Del Perro Pier ferris wheel visible in the distance. As the character exits the frame, the camera maintains its momentum, leaving the residential building behind. The scene then opens up, shifting the focus entirely toward the distant ferris wheel and the silhouette of mountains under the sunset sky.
